chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Civil Revision Application No.42 of 2023 [Abdul Hayat v. Pakistan Steel Mills Corporation Ltd. and others] ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hg of main case 20.01.2025. Mr. Arif Khan, advocate for applicant. Syed Fazalur Rehman, advocate for respondents. Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing this revision application, has agreed not to press the same if respondent Pakistan Steel Mills permits applicant to lift/recollect the rejected material lying in the warehouse of Pakistan Steel Mills within sixty days and approach the Arbitrator in terms of sale agreement for resolving the issue. Learned counsel for respondents/ Pakistan Steel Mills has agreed to allow the plaintiff/applicant to lift/recollect the rejected material, however, he submits that if plaintiff/applicant approaches the Arbitrator for resolving the issue, it will be on his own risk and cost because there are concurrent findings of Civil Courts against him on the same issue. Accordingly, in view of above, this Civil Revision Application is dismissed as not pressed. Nonetheless, Pakistan Steel Mills will permit the plaintiff/applicant to lift/recollect his rejected material from the warehouse within sixty days. Any application for Arbitrator by the applicant would be subject to all exceptions and at his risk and cost. The Civil Revision Application is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE HANIF
